summary: Iteration 11 - Russian Localization Testing. Found 6 localization issues where English text appears when Russian is selected. 14 of 16 localization tests passed. 2 tests failed documenting genuine localization bugs that need fixing.

ui_bugs.issue: English text 'Normal operations' displayed when Russian is selected
English alert message 'Large whale transaction detected' not translated
English action hint 'Monitor exchange flows' not translated
English status 'ABSORBING (12.64x)' displayed instead of Russian

ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Add PROFIT_TAKING to translateStatus() function - should be 'ФИКСАЦИЯ ПРИБЫЛИ'

action_items: PRIORITY HIGH: Fix War Mode tab - translate 'Normal operations', alert messages ('Large whale transaction detected', 'Extreme funding rate detected', 'Consider counter-trading the crowd'), and action hints ('Monitor exchange flows')
PRIORITY HIGH: Fix ETF tab - translate 'ABSORBING' status badge to 'ПОГЛОЩЕНИЕ'
PRIORITY MEDIUM: Fix Onchain tab - add 'PROFIT_TAKING' to translateStatus() function in DashboardTabs.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Localization tests created. 6 English text issues found when Russian language is selected: 1) War Mode: 'Normal operations', 'Large whale transaction detected', 'Monitor exchange flows' 2) ETF tab: 'ABSORBING' status 3) Onchain tab: 'PROFIT_TAKING' status. The translateStatus() function exists in DashboardTabs.js but some statuses and alert messages are not being passed through it. The LanguageContext.js has comprehensive translations but the API-returned messages are not being translated.

english_text_found: Large whale transaction detected - alert message
Monitor exchange flows - alert action hint
Extreme funding rate detected - alert message (when visible)
Consider counter-trading the crowd - alert action (when visible)
war_mode_tab.fix_approach: Create translateStressMessage() and translateAlertAction() functions similar to translateStressLevel()

etf_tab.fix_approach: Translate data.etf_absorption?.status to Russian before displaying

onchain_tab.fix_approach: Add 'PROFIT_TAKING': 'ФИКСАЦИЯ ПРИБЫЛИ' to translations object in translateStatus()
